recommendations.title: Zero for Conduct
recommendations.overview: In a repressive boarding school with rigid rules of behavior, four boys decide to rebel against the director on a celebration day.

recommendations.title: Frances Ha
recommendations.overview: An aspiring dancer moves to New York City and becomes caught up in a whirlwind of flighty fair-weather friends, diminishing fortunes and career setbacks.

recommendations.title: Black Dynamite
recommendations.overview: This is the story of 1970s African-American action legend Black Dynamite. The Man killed his brother, pumped heroin into local orphanages, and flooded the ghetto with adulterated malt liquor. Black Dynamite was the one hero willing to fight The Man a

recommendations.title: The Legendary Giulia and Other Miracles
recommendations.overview: Five down-on-their luck strangers meet by chance while looking at a property in the country none of them are able to afford. They decide to join forces and risk everything to turn it into a B&B, only for the local mafia to show up demanding their "fa

recommendations.title: One Man and his Cow
recommendations.overview: An Algerian man's life-long dream finally comes true when he receives an invitation to take his cow Jacqueline to the Paris International Agriculture Fair.

recommendations.title: Don't Worry, I'm Fine
recommendations.overview: A 19-year-old searches for her twin brother after he runs away from home, following a fight with their father.

recommendations.title: The Sugarland Express
recommendations.overview: Married small-time crooks Lou-Jean and Clovis Poplin lose their baby to the state of Texas and resolve to do whatever it takes to get him back. Lou-Jean gets Clovis out of jail, and the two steal their son from his foster home, in addition to taking

recommendations.title: YES DAY
recommendations.overview: A mom and dad who usually say no decide to say yes to their kids' wildest requests — with a few ground rules — on a whirlwind day of fun and adventure.

recommendations.title: Beneath the Darkness
recommendations.overview: After watching their best friend get murdered, a group of teens struggle to expose a local hero as the vicious killer and keep from becoming his next victims.

recommendations.title: Delhi Belly
recommendations.overview: Three unsuspecting, average guys find themselves on the hit list of one of India's most-powerful crime syndicates.
